title: Resolve, Authorizing the State Tax Assessor to Convey the Interest of the State in Certain Real Estate in the Unorganized Territory
last_house_action: 6/16/2025 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on January 6, 2025. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Resolve was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED. Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ and ACCEPTED, in concurrence. READ ONCE Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED , in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
